---
title: "test_lexicon_lift.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\augmented_intel\test_lexicon_lift.py"
loc: 26
complexity: 1
logic_score: 3.92
style_score: 3.90
intel_score: 4.48
overall_score: 3.41
---

## Intent
The `test_lexicon_lift.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestLexiconLift, test_lexicon_lift_trigger, MockBraveSearch, search, MockCortex, __init__, add_node, MockVector, __init__, search. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestLexiconLift, test_lexicon_lift_trigger, MockBraveSearch, search, MockCortex, __init__, add_node, MockVector, __init__, search. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.core.sv_engine](file://src.core.sv_engine)

### Exports
- `TestLexiconLift`
- `test_lexicon_lift_trigger`
- `MockBraveSearch`
- `search`
- `MockCortex`
- `__init__`
- `add_node`
- `MockVector`
- `__init__`
- `search`
